plugins.name: helio
plugins.description: ZURB's Helio user research platform — 17 skills covering platform orientation (App, CLI, MCP, Features), test lifecycle (Patterns, Asset-to-Test, Section Types, Audience Flow, Branching), platform mechanics (Assets, Licensing, Participant Experience), and measurement & synthesis (UX Metrics, Report Filtering, Design Analysis, Findings, Reading-a-Report+Glare-Signal). Companion marketplace to Glare.
